_provenance.variantRole: One captured trait amplified — AI Sparkle Pervasive
_provenance.variantThesis: The captured AI add-on lockup gradient becomes a chromatic vocabulary for AI activity. The brand signals where AI is working without claiming it in words. Reservation discipline: gradient is semantic, not decorative.
_provenance.amplifiedTrait: samples/static/plan-page/Acrobat Plans — PDF & Productivity.html § .merch-card__addon gradient (linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000)) elevated from one-off pricing-card lockup to ambient AI affordance system

components.name: button-ai-gradient
components.treatment: ds-btn ds-btn--ai (AI-context primary CTA — gradient surface)
components.css: .ds-btn--ai { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2 0%, #EB1000 100%); color: #fff; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(141, 136, 242, 0.24); } .ds-btn--ai:hover { box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(141, 136, 242, 0.36); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn--ai:focus-visible { outline-color: rgba(141, 136, 242, 0.5); }

components.name: ai-card
components.treatment: ds-card--ai (1.5px gradient border via layered background-clip)
components.css: .ds-card--ai { padding: 24px; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(#0a0a14, #0a0a14) padding-box, linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000) border-box; border: 1.5px solid transparent; color: #fff; } .ds-card--ai__eyebrow { color: rgba(141, 136, 242, 0.9); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; }
components.reservation: AI feature cards only — Generative Fill, AI Assistant, Firefly contexts

components.name: ai-eyebrow
components.treatment: eyebrow--ai (2px gradient bottom-border on AI-context eyebrows)
components.css: .eyebrow--ai { display: inline-block; font-family: var(--ds-body-family); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #fff; padding-bottom: 4px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000) bottom / 100% 2px no-repeat; }

components.name: ai-text
components.css: .ai-sparkle { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; font-weight: 900; }
components.reservation: Dark substrate only — gradient text on light fails contrast. Apply ONLY to key AI verbs in AI hero contexts.

components.name: ai-mnemonic-ribbon
components.treatment: ai-product-tile ribbon — gradient corner accent on AI-product mnemonic tiles
components.css: .ai-mnemonic-ribbon { position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ai-mnemonic-ribbon::after { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000); clip-path: polygon(100% 0, 0 0, 100% 100%); }
components.reservation: Firefly + AI Assistant + Generative Fill tile mnemonics only

card-border.css: background: linear-gradient(<surface>, <surface>) padding-box, linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000) border-box; border: 1.5px solid transparent;

text-emphasis.css: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent;
text-emphasis.apply-to: Key AI verbs in AI hero contexts on dark substrates only

icon-ribbon.apply-to: Firefly + AI Assistant + Generative Fill product mnemonic tiles

divergence.amplifiedTrait: AI add-on gradient lockup elevated to ambient AI affordance system
divergence.amplifiedTraitSource: samples/static/plan-page/Acrobat Plans — PDF & Productivity.html § .merch-card__addon — 1.5px gradient border on AI add-on row in business pricing cards. Variant F amplifies this single instance into a reservation-disciplined chromatic vocabulary across AI-affordance surfaces site-wide.
divergence.brand_faithful_inversions:
inherits-from-A (3) + 1 variant-local addition:
  - Inversion #4 (variant F only): "gradient text legal in AI-affordance contexts on dark substrates with ≥4.5:1 contrast against gradient midpoint". Reason: amplification extends the captured border-only gradient to text emphasis on key AI verbs; impeccable's hard rule 'gradient text — never' is inverted only in this narrow AI-dark-substrate carve-out. Verified contrast: gradient midpoint ≈ #8C4779 against #0a0a14 = ~6.8:1. Passes AA.

guards.name: B-but-more
guards.rationale: F amplifies a distinct captured trait (AI gradient lockup) vs A's baseline. Different from B's motion choreography and C's photo-led tiles — different captured trait.

guards.name: gradient-text-as-decoration
guards.rationale: Gradient text appears ONLY on AI verbs in AI hero contexts on dark substrates. The reservation discipline keeps it from being decorative.

guards.name: decorative-gradient-creep
guards.rationale: F's reservation discipline explicitly forbids gradient on non-AI surfaces (promos, hubs, news, footer). Audit: every gradient instance in home-F-proposed.html must cite an AI-affordance reason.

guards.name: C-cliff
guards.rationale: F answers 'what if we leaned into the AI gradient?' with a specific Y from the captured surface, not a slider position past A/B/C.

extensions.iaPriorities: inherits-from-A (commercial-conversion locked first-viewport, audience-routing locked nav, product-mnemonic-discoverability movable but F surfaces ≥3 AI-product mnemonics in first viewport (Firefly + AI Assistant + Generative Fill), trust-signals movable, persistent-help footer-adjacent)

do: Adobe Photoshop, now with [Generative Fill in gradient]. — eyebrow gradient underline + gradient verb
Acrobat [AI Assistant in gradient] reads your documents. — AI capability named in gradient text on dark hero
Try AI free — gradient-surface CTA, one per viewport
Save 50% Creative Cloud Pro — NO gradient (it's a price, not AI)
dont: Gradient on every eyebrow regardless of context (ambient creep)
Gradient text on light substrate (contrast risk + non-captured pattern)
Gradient on the 'View all products' footer link (system-component chrome, not AI)
Two gradient CTAs in one viewport (dilutes the signal)
Gradient bars or strips as ambient decoration

extensions.systemComponentRoles: inherits-from-A (header, footer, persistent-search, etc. — none of these are AI affordance surfaces by default)

narrative.northStar: The captured AI add-on gradient becomes the brand's chromatic vocabulary for AI activity. The user reads the gradient as 'AI is at work here' without parsing copy. The discipline is reservation: gradient = AI signal, never decoration.
narrative.overview: Inherits A's tokens unchanged. Variant-local: 5 AI-affordance surfaces (eyebrow underline, card border, text emphasis, CTA surface, icon ribbon) all driven by the captured `.merch-card__addon` gradient `linear-gradient(135deg, #8D88F2, #EB1000)`. Dark substrates (#0a0a14) for AI hero contexts so gradients read with high contrast. Non-AI sections stay light + token-faithful. One brand-faithful inversion added vs A: gradient text legal in AI-dark-substrate contexts.
keyCharacteristics: Dark hero substrate for AI contexts (contrast).
Light non-AI sections retain A's tokens (dark↔light carries semantic).
One AI gradient CTA per viewport.
Gradient text only on dark with contrast check.
Inherits A's complete IA-priority audit + improvements floor.
dos: Gradient eyebrow underline on AI-context section headers.
Gradient-border AI feature cards (Generative Fill / AI Assistant / Firefly).
Gradient text on key AI verbs in AI hero contexts (dark substrate only).
Gradient CTA surface for 'Try AI free' or equivalent (one per viewport).
Dark hero substrate for AI moments.
donts: Gradient on non-AI surfaces (promos, hubs, news, footer).
Gradient text on light substrates (contrast risk; not the captured pattern).
Decorative gradient strips or ambient washes.
Gradient on 'Save 50%' style promotional copy (price ≠ AI).
